home.heroDescription: Corpore Sano helps you schedule free online meetings with our nutrition specialists in a simple and comfortable way.
home.videoSectionHeading: Short guides from our nutrition specialists.

contact.pageIntro: Send us a message using the form below. We’ll reply as soon as we can.

labels.subject: Subject
labels.success: Thanks — your message was sent. We’ll get back to you soon.

about.pageIntro: Learn more about Corpore Sano and how we support your nutrition journey.

sections.title: Our mission
sections.body: Corpore Sano helps people build sustainable eating habits through clear guidance and personal online consultations with qualified nutrition specialists.

sections.title: How we work
sections.body: We combine evidence-based nutrition science with a practical approach—so you get plans that fit your life, not generic advice. Book a free consultation to get started.

videos.title: Healthy eating basics
videos.desc: A short introduction to balanced nutrition and how to achieve it.

videos.title: Meal planning tips
videos.desc: Simple ideas for meal planning and consistency.

videos.title: Nutrition for beginners
videos.desc: A quick intro to better food choices.

videos.title: Healthy snacks
videos.desc: Simple healthy snack ideas for your day.

videosPage.title: All videos
videosPage.intro: Short guides from our nutrition specialists.

bookMeeting.title: Book a meeting
bookMeeting.intro: Choose an available time slot and fill in your details.

nutritionists.title: Our nutritionists
nutritionists.intro: This page introduces Corpore Sano’s nutrition specialists.

contactForm.subject: Subject
contactForm.success: Thanks — your message was sent. We’ll get back to you soon.
contactForm.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
contactForm.errorValidation: Please check the form and try again.
contactForm.errorNetwork: We could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
contactForm.emailPartialWarning: Your message was saved, but we could not send the notification email. Our team can still see it in our system.

schedule.genderHint: We match you with the specialist for your selection (male / female).
schedule.title: Select a date & time
schedule.pickGenderForSlots: Choose your gender above to see available times for that team.
schedule.noSlots: No times available for this date.
schedule.enterNameEmail: Please enter your name and email above.
schedule.pickGenderSpecialist: Please select your gender so we can assign the right specialist.
schedule.slotTaken: That slot was just taken. Please pick another time.
schedule.recentBooking: You’ve already had a meeting in the last 24 hours.
schedule.verifySkipped: Thanks — your booking was saved. Verification could not be started (no browser URL). If you’re developing locally, set VITE_SEND_BOOKING_VERIFICATION_URL to your live function URL or run netlify dev.
schedule.verify401: Could not reach the verification service (unauthorized). If Netlify has BOOKING_FUNCTION_SECRET set, add the same value as VITE_BOOKING_FUNCTION_SECRET and redeploy — or remove that secret from Netlify and the site.
schedule.verify502WithDetail: Your booking was saved, but the email service rejected the send: {detail}
schedule.verify502Generic: Your booking was saved, but sending the email failed. In Netlify → Functions → send-booking-verification → Logs, look for "Resend error". In Resend, check API key, verified domain for "from", and that the recipient is allowed (sandbox only allows test addresses).
schedule.verifyOther: Your booking was saved, but we could not send the verification email{status}. Please contact us.
schedule.autoVerified: You’re booked. Your appointment is confirmed (email provider not configured on the server, so we confirmed it automatically).
schedule.emailSent: Check your email to verify your appointment. Your time is reserved until you confirm.
schedule.verifyEmailMinutes: Check your email for a link to verify your appointment. You have {minutes} minutes to confirm, or this booking will be cancelled.

bookMeetingPage.verifyCalendarSyncFailed: Your appointment is verified. We could not add it to our calendar automatically — our team will follow up, or check your inbox for a calendar invite if one was sent.
bookMeetingPage.verifySuccess: Your appointment is verified. Thank you — we’ll see you then.
bookMeetingPage.verifyInvalid: This confirmation link is invalid or expired. Please book again or contact us.
bookMeetingPage.verifyError: We could not confirm your appointment. Please contact us.
bookMeetingPage.confirmedLine: Your appointment has been successfully confirmed.

posts.emptyTag: No posts found in this section.

adminGate.configure: Configure Supabase environment variables to use admin tools.

adminSignIn.notConfigured: Supabase is not configured. Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and an anon key (VITE_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_DEFAULT_KEY or VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY) to your env file.
adminSignIn.title: Admin sign in
adminSignIn.subtitle: Use the account created in Supabase Authentication (no public sign-up).

adminForgot.title: Reset admin password
adminForgot.subtitle: Enter the email for your admin account. We’ll send a link to set a new password. New accounts are not created here — only staff added in Supabase can sign in.
adminForgot.done: Check your email for a reset link. After you choose a new password, you can sign in from the sign-in page.

adminReset.title: Set a new password
adminReset.subtitle: Open the link from your email on this device. If this page stays blank, the link may have expired — request a new one from forgot password.
adminReset.waitingSession: Waiting for a valid reset session… If nothing happens, use the link from your email again or request a new reset.

adminBookings.noProfile: This email does not have an active admin profile in public.admins.
adminBookings.badGender: This admin profile is missing a valid gender value. Use male or female in public.admins.
adminBookings.confirmRemove: Remove this appointment? This cannot be undone.
adminBookings.name: Name
adminBookings.showingLine: Showing only {line} appointments for this admin account.

adminPosts.externalModeLabel: Use external page mode (disable default post fields)
adminPosts.externalImagePh: External page image URL (auto-filled when available)
adminPosts.externalUrlRequired: External page URL is required when external mode is enabled.
adminPosts.externalSaveMissingColumn: External URL was not saved. Run the latest Supabase migration to add posts.external_url, then save again.

adminHeroBanners.bucketHint: Images are stored in the Supabase Storage bucket “{bucket}” (public read). Run the SQL migration and create the bucket if it does not exist yet.
adminHeroBanners.dualImageHint: Upload both for separate desktop and mobile art. One file is enough: it is used on all breakpoints. Existing banners with a single image keep working.
adminHeroBanners.colorHint: Leave empty to use the default banner colour. Hex only, e.g. #ffffff or #fff.
adminHeroBanners.colorInvalid: Title and subtitle colours must be empty or a valid hex value (#rgb or #rrggbb).
adminHeroBanners.ctaUrl: CTA URL (optional — internal path or full URL)
adminHeroBanners.confirmDelete: Delete this banner and its image from storage?
adminHeroBanners.titleRequired: Enter at least one banner title (Albanian or English) in the form.
adminHeroBanners.sortInvalid: Sort order must be a number.
adminHeroBanners.ctaUrlMissing: If you set a CTA label, add a CTA URL (or clear the labels).
adminHeroBanners.imageRequired: Choose an image for a new banner (or upload a replacement when editing).
adminHeroBanners.empty: No banners yet. Add one above.

adminLogin.confirmReset: Reset all site copy to defaults? This clears saved admin data in this browser.
adminLogin.remoteLoad: Could not load site from Supabase: {error}. Using saved browser data or defaults.
adminLogin.bilingualEnabledHint: When disabled, the site is Albanian-only and the header language control is hidden.
adminLogin.sectionsHiddenHint: Checked = hidden for visitors. These apply to both languages when you save.
adminLogin.hideHomeLatestPosts: Hide “latest posts” block on the home page
adminLogin.hideHomeVideos: Hide the videos block on the home page
adminLogin.hideVideosPage: Hide the Videos page (/videos) and the “View all videos” link
adminLogin.hidePosts: Hide all posts (home block, header tag links, /posts pages)
adminLogin.editingLocaleHint: The fields below edit the Albanian or English version of the site. This admin interface stays in English.
adminLogin.bgPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the default bundled image
adminLogin.bgHint: Full URL (https://…) or a path under /public e.g. /my-bg.jpg
adminLogin.sectionsHint: Each section has its own text-column background; colors adjust for readable contrast.
adminLogin.heading: Heading
adminLogin.aboutSectionClickableHint: Uses the whole section URL. The optional button still uses the button URL. These URLs apply to both languages; the button label follows the site copy language above.
adminLogin.videosHint: Only videos with “Published” checked appear on the site. YouTube watch URLs work best.
adminLogin.phoneSecondaryHref: Secondary phone (href, optional, digits only e.g. +38344123456)
adminLogin.extraFooterHint: The default footer info stays as the first column. After every 5 total info rows, a new footer column is created automatically.
adminLogin.linkEmail: Link value (optional, leave empty to use the same email)
adminLogin.bookingsHint: Consultation requests from the home page booking flow. Male bookings use the male specialist calendar; female use the female calendar when Google sync is configured.
adminLogin.postsHint: Create, edit, publish, and remove website posts.
adminLogin.heroBannersHint: Manage the image carousel at the top of the home page. One image is shared for both languages; set Albanian and English text separately.
adminLogin.tagsHint: Manage post tags. Tags marked for navigation will appear as menu items on the site.
adminLogin.remoteSaveFailed: Supabase sync failed: {error}. Check that you are signed in and that RLS policies allow updates.

errors.pastDate: That date is no longer available.
errors.pastSlot: That time slot has already passed.
errors.recentBooking: You’ve already had a meeting in the last 24 hours.
